strategy_summary: The binary is a 64-bit ELF with full RELRO, NX, and no PIE. The main vulnerability appears to be in the format string handling within the sub_400B07 function, where user input is directly passed to printf. We can use this to leak libc addresses via the GOT and then overwrite a function pointer or return address to get code execution. Since there's no PIE, we can calculate the offsets of the GOT entries. We will first measure the offset for the format string vulnerability and then attempt to leak
